ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "core_symbol" TEXT /* Currency pair or asset symbol (e.g., BCH/USD) */,
  "simple_average_price" REAL /* Simple average price of the asset */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume weighted average price of the asset */,
  "highest_executed_price" REAL /* Highest executed price on that date */,
  "lowest_executed_price" REAL /* Lowest executed price on that date */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., cryptocurrency, forex) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_core_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("core_symbol") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_pairs" (
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency pair */,
  "pair_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency pair (e.g., BCH/USD) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency pair */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the pair */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the pair */,
  "pair_type" TEXT /* Type of currency pair (e.g., cryptocurrency, forex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, executed, cancelled) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Trade fee amount */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Trade fee currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Securely hashed user password */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_group" TEXT /* Group of related permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade history record */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Volume of the trade */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Trade fee amount */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Trade fee currency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market analysis entry */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Calculated average price for the period */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Forecast for future price movements */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the policy applies */,
  "max_loss_limit" REAL /* Maximum loss limit for user trading */,
  "max_trade_size" REAL /* Maximum trade size for user */,
  "max_position_size" REAL /* Maximum position size for user */,
  "stop_loss_level" REAL /* Stop-loss level for user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "pair_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency pair associated with the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price threshold) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value that triggers the alert */,
  "alert_triggered" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been triggered */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., once, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_pair_id FOREIGN KEY ("pair_id") REFERENCES currency_pairs ("pair_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Full content of the news article */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the news article (e.g., market news, economic news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., trade execution, analysis available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
